crossRefs.label: If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.

blocks.text: Warm up the radiator fan until it operates twice. Place the vehicle on a level surface and stop the engine.

Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat. Turn ignition to ON mode. Verify that HDS communicates with the vehicle and the PGM-FI ECU. If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.

refs.label: If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.

blocks.text: Securely apply the parking brake and fasten the front and rear tires. Start the engine. While pressing down firmly on the brake pedal, set the select lever to the D position and press down on the accelerator pedal, making sure that the engine does not stop when the pedal is abruptly released. Stop the vehicle in the middle of a hill. Turn the SELECT lever to the P position, release the brake and check the parking operation. Test driving on a flat road in D-position ECON ON, ECON OFF mode, and L-position; driving at the accelerator pedal position sensor voltage (accelerator pedal opening) specified in the driving position table using HDS to check vehicle speed and engine speed. Ensure that the parking brake is applied, and that the front and rear tires are secured with wheel stops. Start the engine. While pressing down firmly on the brake pedal, set the select lever to the D position and press down on the accelerator pedal, making sure that the engine does not stop when the pedal is abruptly released. Stop the vehicle in the middle of a hill. Turn the SELECT lever to the P position, release the brake and check the parking operation. Test driving on a flat road in D-position ECON ON, ECON OFF mode, and S-position, using HDS at the accelerator pedal position sensor voltage (accelerator pedal opening) specified in the driving position table to check vehicle speed and engine speed.
